transformed_query: WITH pts AS (SELECT t.dimension_code AS ticker, EXTRACT(YEAR FROM dp.time) AS yr, m.dimension_code AS metric, dp.value, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY t.dimension_code, EXTRACT(YEAR FROM dp.time), m.dimension_code ORDER BY dp.time DESC) AS rn, dp.series_id FROM data_points AS dp JOIN dimensions AS t ON t.series_id = dp.series_id AND t.dimension_type = 'ticker' AND t.dimension_code IN ('ETN', 'ROK', 'GE', 'EMR', 'WAB', 'TT', 'GLW', 'FAST', 'WCC', 'VRT', 'HON', 'JCI', 'CMI', 'PCAR', 'DE', 'OTIS', 'CARR', 'COHR', 'FN', 'LITE', 'AME', 'WTS', 'FLS', 'CR', 'ITT', 'LII', 'DHR', 'IR', 'IEX', 'CAT', 'ALLE', 'AMAT', 'KLAC', 'RTX', 'HWM', 'TDG', 'WWD') JOIN dimensions AS m ON m.series_id = dp.series_id AND m.dimension_type = 'metric_code' AND m.dimension_code = 'operating_income' WHERE dp.series_id IN (SELECT series_id FROM series WHERE series_id LIKE '%consolidated_annual') AND dp.time >= '2019-06-01') SELECT ticker, MAX(CASE WHEN yr = 2020 AND rn = 1 THEN value END) AS y2020, MAX(CASE WHEN yr = 2021 AND rn = 1 THEN value END) AS y2021, MAX(CASE WHEN yr = 2022 AND rn = 1 THEN value END) AS y2022, MAX(CASE WHEN yr = 2023 AND rn = 1 THEN value END) AS y2023, MAX(CASE WHEN yr = 2024 AND rn = 1 THEN value END) AS y2024, MAX(CASE WHEN yr = 2025 AND rn = 1 THEN value END) AS y2025 FROM pts GROUP BY ticker ORDER BY ticker
